page: Amazon Web Services m8ine.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the m8ine server family. It is powered by an Intel x86_64 processor running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance features 2 virtual CPUs mapped to 1 physical core with hyper-threading enabled, providing 2 threads per core. It is configured with 8.0 GB of dedicated system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance utilizes the AWS Nitro hypervisor to manage virtualization overhead. It does not include any local instance storage, meaning all storage operations must rely on external Elastic Block Store volumes. The network configuration provides a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m8ine.large offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation without the overhead of local storage. The lack of local NVMe storage represents a tradeoff, requiring users to architect solutions around network-attached storage. This hardware profile is suitable for general-purpose workloads, including small-scale web serving, lightweight application servers, and basic development environments.
description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.large is a general-purpose instance within the m8ine family, powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel x86_64 processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs derived from a single physical core with 2 threads, paired with 8.0 GB of system memory. Virtualized via the AWS Nitro hypervisor, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. It does not include local storage, requiring external EBS volumes for persistent data. This resource configuration offers a balanced vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 1:4, making it a cost-efficient option for workloads that do not require high-speed local disk access. The m8ine.large is designed for general-purpose applications, such as lightweight web servers, microservices, and development environments.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.large is a general-purpose instance featuring a 3.9 GHz Intel processor, 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth running on the Nitro hypervisor.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, Nitro virtualization, and network-optimized performance for standard workloads.

No local storage, requiring external EBS volumes
Suitable for general-purpose workloads and web serving
